message.content: {"items":[{"title":"German Youth (West) 1980","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1601","justification":"Survey of West German youth conducted in 1980; focuses on living conditions, education, leisure, political attitudes, and social indicators among young people in (West) Germany in the early 1980s."},{"title":"German Youth (West) 1985","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1602","justification":"Follow-up survey of West German youth in 1985; covers social situation, education, employment, leisure, values and political attitudes, directly related to youth social conditions in Germany in the mid-1980s."},{"title":"German Youth (West) 1989","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1603","justification":"Survey of West German youth from 1989; examines living conditions, social integration, family, work, education, and political views of young people in Germany at the end of the 1980s."},{"title":"German Youth 1981","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1650","justification":"Survey of youth in Germany conducted in 1981; includes questions on family background, education, employment situation, leisure activities and value orientations, thus reflecting social indicators and conditions of youth."},{"title":"German Youth 1982","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1651","justification":"Youth survey from 1982 in Germany; focuses on living standards, schooling, occupational aspirations, social relationships and political orientations of young people, linked to social conditions in the early 1980s."},{"title":"German Youth 1983","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1652","justification":"1983 German youth study; addresses educational and employment situations, leisure patterns, family relations and attitudes toward society and politics, which are key social indicators for youth in Germany."},{"title":"German Youth 1984","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1653","justification":"Youth survey conducted in Germany in 1984; contains information on social background, school/work, leisure, values, and political attitudes of young people, documenting social conditions and indicators mid‑1980s."},{"title":"German Youth 1986","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1655","justification":"1986 survey of youth in Germany; examines family and housing situation, education, work, leisure, media use, values, and political orientations, all relevant to social conditions and indicators among youth."},{"title":"German Youth 1987","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1656","justification":"Youth survey from 1987 in Germany; focuses on living situation, education and employment, leisure, attitudes to social issues and politics, providing indicators on social conditions of German youth in the late 1980s."},{"title":"German Youth 1988","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1657","justification":"Survey of German youth in 1988; covers socio‑demographic background, schooling, work, leisure, media and value orientations, and political attitudes, offering a broad set of social indicators for youth in Germany during the 1980s."}]}
